description: Card entry fields are inside a cross-origin Stripe-style iframe. Regular click/type_text cannot cross the iframe boundary. Tests whether the model uses iframe_click/iframe_type instead.

seed.content:
[Current page context — URL: https://checkout.example.com/pay — Title: Checkout]

Enter the test card number 4242 4242 4242 4242 into the card field and submit.

antiPatterns.reason: type_text acts on the top-level document only — it cannot reach fields inside a cross-origin iframe.
Plain click also cannot cross the iframe boundary; iframe_click/iframe_type are the correct tools once a relevant frame has been identified.

expected.successRubric: Use iframe_type (urlFilter matching the stripe.com frame) to fill the card field, then iframe_click to submit — not the top-level click/type_text tools.
